name: Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output
description: The product prepares a structured message for another component but fails to properly encode or escape the data, allowing attackers to alter the message's intended structure and inject special characters that change downstream interpretation.
detection_pattern: Data flows from any node to an EGRESS or EXTERNAL node that outputs to a structured context (HTML, SQL, shell, logs) without passing through a TRANSFORM node that performs context-appropriate encoding or escaping
